description: The 'TaskTracker' app has a placeholder 'Settings' button (ID: btn_settings) on the Home screen that currently does nothing. Your task is to implement the Settings screen and wire it up. Create a new fragment named 'SettingsFragment' in the 'com.example.tasktracker' package with a corresponding layout file 'fragment_settings.xml'. Configure the navigation graph to include this fragment as a destination with the ID 'settingsFragment' and an action from the home fragment with the ID 'action_home_to_settings'. Implement the navigation logic so that clicking the settings button on the Home screen opens the new Settings screen. Ensure the project builds successfully.
